tool_summary: Displays the contents of one or more text files to the standard output.
platform_notes: The Windows type command is a basic read-only utility with no flags. Its behavior is consistent across common Windows environments.

rules.description: The type command reads the contents of one or more specified files and outputs them to the terminal. This may expose sensitive information depending on the target file.
rules.notes: The tool is read-only. The risk of privacy breach depends entirely on the file targeted by the user.
